sentences.english: Do you prefer reading printed books or e-books?
sentences.korean: 종이 책과 전자책 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: While e-books are convenient I still prefer printed books.
sentences.korean: 전자책이 편리하지만 여전히 종이 책을 선호해요.

sentences.english: First there's something about the physical experience of turning pages and the smell of paper that makes reading more enjoyable.
sentences.korean: 첫째 페이지를 넘기는 물리적 경험과 종이 냄새는 읽기를 더 즐겁게 만드는 뭔가가 있어요.

sentences.english: Second research shows that people retain information better when reading from paper compared to screens.
sentences.korean: 둘째 연구에 따르면 화면보다 종이에서 읽을 때 정보를 더 잘 기억해요.

sentences.english: Also reading a printed book before bed doesn't expose your eyes to blue light which can disrupt sleep.
sentences.korean: 또한 자기 전에 종이 책을 읽으면 수면을 방해할 수 있는 블루라이트에 눈이 노출되지 않아요.

sentences.english: For these reasons I'll always choose a printed book when I have the option.
sentences.korean: 이러한 이유로 선택지가 있으면 항상 종이 책을 선택할 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Eating at Home vs. Eating Out
Attending a Large vs. Small School
